children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: The Secretary shall establish an advisory council on health care and benefits for covered children.

children.heading: .—Membership
children.label: b .—Membership
children.text: The advisory council established under subsection (a) shall be composed of Federal employees.

children.heading: .—Duties
children.label: c .—Duties
children.text: The advisory council established under subsection (a) shall solicit feedback from covered children and covered veterans on the health care and benefits provided under this chapter and communicate such feedback to the Secretary.
